understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by moving all selectable pieces (P or S) onto every goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level to achieve WIN and complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shifts the selected piece one cell (3 pixels) in the direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) but blocked by walls (#) or boundaries. CLICK switches control to another selectable at the exact target_position without moving pieces. Multiple selectables require switching via CLICK to position each independently; all goals must be covered at once for win, with finite steps_remaining per level.
